proof:
calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := abs_add _ _
    _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by rw [abs_mul, abs_of_pos (show (3 : ℝ) > 0 by norm_num)]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by rw [sub_zero] at hh; bound
failed_attempts:
apply le_trans (abs_add (3 * x) h)
  rw [abs_mul]
  norm_num
  bound
linarith [abs_add (3 * x) h, abs_mul 3 x, hh, δ_le1]
apply (abs_add _ _).trans; rw [abs_mul]; norm_num; linarith

calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := abs_add _ _
    _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by rw [abs_mul]; norm_num
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by linarith
sub_zero] at *; norm_num; linarith
apply le_trans (abs_add_le _ _); bound

apply le_trans (abs_add (3 * x) h)
  bound [abs_mul]

apply le_trans (abs_add _ _)
  rw [abs_mul, abs_of_pos (show (3 : ℝ) > 0 by norm_num)]
  linarith
apply (abs_add _ _).trans; rw [abs_mul, abs_of_pos (by norm_num)]; bound

apply le_trans (abs_add_le (3 * x) h)
  rw [abs_mul]; norm_num; linarith

apply le_trans (abs_add _ _)
  bound

calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := abs_add _ _
    _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by rw [abs_mul, abs_of_pos (by norm_num)]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by linarith
apply le_trans (abs_add _ _); linarith [abs_mul 3 x]
apply le_trans (abs_add _ _); bound

apply le_trans (abs_add (3 * x) h)
  rewrite [abs_mul, abs_of_pos (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 3)]
  linarith

apply le_trans (abs_add _ _)
  rw [abs_mul, abs_of_pos (by norm_num)]
  linarith

apply le_trans (abs_add _ _)
  rw [abs_mul, abs_of_pos (by norm_num)]
  linarith
apply le_trans (abs_add _ _); bound

calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := abs_add _ _
    _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by rw [abs_mul, abs_of_pos (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 3)]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by linarith [hh, δ_le1]
linarith [abs_add (3 * x) h, abs_mul 3 x, abs_of_pos (by norm_num : (3 : ℝ) > 0)]

apply le_trans (abs_add (3 * x) h)
  rw [abs_mul, abs_of_pos (by norm_num)]
  bound

show |(3 : ℝ)| = 3 by norm_num]
  linarith

apply le_trans (abs_add _ _)
  rw [abs_mul, abs_of_pos (by linarith : (0 : ℝ) < 3)]
  linarith

calc |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := abs_add (3 * x) h
    _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by rewrite [abs_mul]; norm_num
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by bound

apply le_trans (abs_add_le _ _)
  rewrite [abs_mul, abs_of_pos (by norm_num)]
  linarith [hh, δ_le1]
apply le_trans (abs_add _ _); bound

calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := abs_add _ _
    _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by rw [abs_mul, abs_of_pos (by linarith)]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by linarith

apply le_trans (abs_add (3 * x) h)
  rw [abs_mul, abs_of_pos (by norm_num)]
  bound
apply le_trans (abs_add _ _); bound

rw [sub_zero] at hh
  calc
    |3 * x + h| ≤ |3 * x| + |h| := abs_add _ _
    _ = 3 * |x| + |h| := by rw [abs_mul, abs_of_pos (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 3)]
    _ ≤ 3 * |x| + 1 := by linarith
successful_attempts:
calc
